parsed_output.justification: Justin is the most suspicious player, as he inconsistently claimed to be the Copycat and then the Robber, admitting he was lying during the 'truth round'. Tyler, claiming to be the Seer, indicated he saw a Werewolf in one of the locations (likely pointing to Justin), and Paul, claiming to be the Troublemaker, also urged the group to vote for Justin. Given Justin's erratic behavior and the accusations from the other players, he is the most likely candidate for the Werewolf.
